# Golden State Rehab

> DHCS-licensed (#191643AP) outpatient addiction and mental-health treatment center in Westwood, West Los Angeles. Programs: PHP, IOP, telehealth, individual & group therapy, medication management. Evidence-based modalities including CBT and DBT. Most major insurance accepted. Bilingual care — se habla español. Admissions available 24/7 at (424) 208-3120.

- [Home](https://www.goldenstate-rehab.com/): Los Angeles outpatient addiction & mental-health treatment center

## About
- [About Us](https://www.goldenstate-rehab.com/about): why Golden State Rehab, licensing, approach
- [Our Story](https://www.goldenstate-rehab.com/our-story)
- [Our Facility](https://www.goldenstate-rehab.com/our-facility): real photos of the Westwood clinic
- [Our Clinical Team](https://www.goldenstate-rehab.com/team): Medical Director Dr. Eric Chaghouri, MD (board-certified psychiatrist)
- [Locations & Areas We Serve](https://www.goldenstate-rehab.com/locations): Westwood office; serving West LA, Santa Monica, Beverly Hills, Culver City

## Treatments
- [All Treatments](https://www.goldenstate-rehab.com/treatments/): conditions we treat
- [Cognitive Behavioral Therapy (CBT)](https://www.goldenstate-rehab.com/treatments/cbt)
- [Dialectical Behavior Therapy (DBT)](https://www.goldenstate-rehab.com/treatments/dbt)
- [Mental Health Treatment](https://www.goldenstate-rehab.com/mental-health): the mental-health track
- [Depression](https://www.goldenstate-rehab.com/treatments/depression), [Anxiety](https://www.goldenstate-rehab.com/treatments/anxiety), [PTSD](https://www.goldenstate-rehab.com/treatments/ptsd), [Complex Trauma](https://www.goldenstate-rehab.com/treatments/complex-trauma), [Dual Diagnosis](https://www.goldenstate-rehab.com/treatments/dual-diagnosis)
- Addiction: [Alcohol](https://www.goldenstate-rehab.com/treatments/alcohol), [Opioid](https://www.goldenstate-rehab.com/treatments/opioid), [Fentanyl](https://www.goldenstate-rehab.com/treatments/fentanyl), [Meth](https://www.goldenstate-rehab.com/treatments/meth), [Cocaine](https://www.goldenstate-rehab.com/treatments/cocaine), [Prescription Drugs](https://www.goldenstate-rehab.com/treatments/prescription-drugs), [Sex Addiction](https://www.goldenstate-rehab.com/treatments/sex-addiction)

## Programs
- [All Programs](https://www.goldenstate-rehab.com/programs/)
- [PHP](https://www.goldenstate-rehab.com/programs/php), [IOP](https://www.goldenstate-rehab.com/programs/iop), [Telehealth](https://www.goldenstate-rehab.com/programs/telehealth), [Individual Therapy](https://www.goldenstate-rehab.com/programs/individual-therapy), [Group Therapy](https://www.goldenstate-rehab.com/programs/group-therapy), [Medication Management](https://www.goldenstate-rehab.com/programs/medication-management), [Holistic Therapies](https://www.goldenstate-rehab.com/programs/holistic-therapies), [Alumni Program](https://www.goldenstate-rehab.com/programs/alumni)

## Contact
- Phone: (424) 208-3120 (24/7 admissions, se habla español)
- Text: (424) 208-3120
- Address: 1964 Westwood Blvd, Ste 425, Los Angeles, CA 90025
- Medical Director: Dr. Eric Chaghouri, MD (Board-Certified Psychiatrist)
- License: California DHCS #191643AP
